case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. EVANGELINE KIRBY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-28-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED JAN-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRBY, EVANGELINE DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2239 20TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
